name: Spdx-maven-plugin
tagline: The SPDX Maven Plugin creates a SPDX v 1.2 report of your project and Maven dependencies. For information about this plugin including licencing information and how to configure your POM, please refer to the README. For information about SPDX see http://www.spdx.org
body:
spdx-maven-plugin
=================

The SPDX Maven Plugin creates a SPDX v 1.2 report of your project and Maven dependencies. For information about this plugin including licencing information and how to configure your POM, please refer to the README. For information about SPDX see http://www.spdx.org
note: Don't delete this file! It's used internally to help with page regeneration.
